vBRIEFInfo.description: Scope vBRIEF ingested from GitHub issue #747

plan.title: feat(scripts,tasks,hooks): detection-bound branch gate — verify:branch + git hooks reading PROJECT-DEFINITION policy field

narratives.Description: feat(scripts,tasks,hooks): detection-bound branch gate -- verify:branch + git hooks reading PROJECT-DEFINITION policy field
narratives.Problem: AGENTS.md's 'never commit directly to master/main unless opted out' rule is prose-only (tier-4 detection). Demonstrably fails to bind: in a 2026-04-29 session reproducing #136, the strongest agent ducked the rule on a benign-looking JSON enrichment task and would have committed directly to master. This issue ships the layered tier-3 mechanical enforcement.
narratives.Acceptance: A. NEW scripts/preflight_branch.py (Python stdlib-only, cross-platform) that reads policy.allowDirectCommitsToMaster (typed per #746) with legacy-narrative fallback + deprecation warning; exits 0 on allowed states (feature branch, detached HEAD, opted-out, env-var bypass) and non-zero with helpful message otherwise; documented setup-interview exemption hook. B. NEW .githooks/pre-commit and .githooks/pre-push shelling out to the script; task setup sets git config core.hooksPath .githooks idempotently. C. NEW verify:branch task wired into task check aggregate. D. verify:hooks-installed (or sibling) asserts core.hooksPath==.githooks and fails 'hooks not installed; run task setup'. E. CI sanity check: GH Actions job asserting head_ref != base_ref on PRs. F. AGENTS.md cross-reference (brief ! line) under Branching pointing to enforcement surfaces + override mechanisms (no rule duplication). G. Documentation: README paragraph + glossary entry coordinated with #746. H. Tests for script (all states), verify:branch task, and CI workflow (master->master PR rejected).
narratives.OutOfScope: Typed-field schema and migration (owned by #746 part A; HARD prerequisite). Setup-interview elicitation (#746). Skill-level defense (#746). Reconfigure surface tasks/policy.yml (#746). Eager-loading of AGENTS.md by Warp (#136).
narratives.Files: NEW scripts/preflight_branch.py; NEW .githooks/pre-commit; NEW .githooks/pre-push; Taskfile.yml or tasks/*.yml (verify:branch + verify:hooks-installed); .github/workflows/ci.yml or new workflow (head_ref != base_ref); AGENTS.md (Branching cross-ref); README.md; tests/cli/test_preflight_branch*.py (new); tests/content/test_branch_gate_integration*.py (new); CHANGELOG.md (append).

items.title: A. NEW scripts/preflight_branch.py (stdlib-only, cross-platform) with all override paths
B. NEW .githooks/pre-commit and .githooks/pre-push; task setup sets core.hooksPath idempotently
C. NEW verify:branch task wired into task check aggregate
D. verify:hooks-installed asserts core.hooksPath==.githooks; fails 'hooks not installed; run task setup'
E. NEW CI sanity check: head_ref != base_ref on PR events
F. AGENTS.md Branching section: brief ! cross-reference to enforcement surfaces + overrides
G. Documentation: README paragraph + glossary entry coordinated with #746
H. Tests: preflight_branch all states, verify:branch task, master->master PR rejection

references.title: Issue #747: feat(scripts,tasks,hooks): detection-bound branch gate — verify:branch + git hooks reading PROJECT-DEFINITION policy field

x-migrator.PhaseDescription: Urgent fixes to land ahead of broader roadmap work -- adoption blockers and bugs that block consumer adoption or successful first-session UX.
